creator: wahjava@gmail.com
text:
If this port is compiled with GCC 3.4 which is shipped with the FreeBSD, it linking fails with missing library "-lssp". So I'm compiling this port with GCC 4.1 .

Version of GCC 4.1 port: gcc-4.1.3_20070402
